params.SpellDescription: The next time a source of your choice would deal damage to any target this turn, prevent that damage. If damage from a red source is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to the source's controller.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: The next time a source of your choice would deal damage to any target this turn, prevent that damage. If damage from a red source is prevented this way, CARDNAME deals that much damage to the source's controller.
